user_prompt: Generate today's pipeline report — how many applications submitted, in interview, rejected, ghosted.
actual_output:
### Daily Pipeline Report

I don’t have any logged application data from today in this chat, so I can’t truthfully calculate submitted / in interview / rejected / ghosted counts yet.

If you paste your application tracker entries, I’ll turn them into a clean report immediately.  
Use this format if helpful:

| Date | Company | Role | Status | Notes |
|------|---------|------|--------|-------|
| 2026-04-30 | Company A | Senior FE Engineer | Submitted | Tailored React/TS resume |
| 2026-04-30 | Company B | Product Engineer | Interview | Recruiter screen scheduled |
| 2026-04-29 | Company C | SWE | Rejected | Auto-reject |
| 2026-04-25 | Company D | Frontend Dev | Ghosted | No response after follow-up |

Once you send the data, I’ll return:
- Total submitted today
- Total in interview
- Total rejected
- Total ghosted
- Quick notes on conversion rate and follow-up priorities
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified that it lacked the necessary data to generate a real report and proactively offered a template and a plan to fulfill the request once the data is provided.
